source: No One Sits Alone - Elder Gerrit W. Gong

questions.question: What example does Elder Gong use to illustrate cultural triangulation?
What symbolizes gathering people from diverse locations in Jacob 5?
What caused the young deacon to stop attending church?
options: Other deacons laughed at his shoes
questions.answer: Other deacons laughed at his shoes

questions.question: “No one sits alone” only refers to physical seating in church meetings.
Gospel culture replaces traditions that contradict commandments.
Everyone is invited to partake of the Lord’s goodness.
Explain what Elder Gong means by “no one sits alone.” Include physical, emotional, and spiritual dimensions.
How does gospel culture differ from national or local culture?
